title: An art exhibition
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: On Saturday, I went to an art exhibition with two friends from college. The exhibition was held (27) a modern gallery near the river. I do not usually visit galleries, so I was not sure whether I would enjoy it. However, some of the paintings were much more colourful (28) I had expected. One room was full of pictures painted (29) young local artists, and I liked seeing work by people close to my own age. A guide told us about the ideas behind several paintings and explained why the artists had chosen certain colours. My friend Anna spent a long time looking (30) one picture of a busy street because it reminded her of her neighbourhood. Before leaving, we wrote comments in a book (31) visitors could share their opinions. I would recommend the exhibition to anyone (32) enjoys modern art.

questions.explanation: Relative adverb referring to a place/book for comments.
